description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a large head, expressive eyes, and short, tousled hair. The child is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt and loose pants, with visible sneakers on both feet. The arms are extended outward horizontally, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The facial features are cartoon-like, with a small nose and a subtle smile. The overall proportions are exaggerated, with a slightly oversized head and hands compared to the body. The surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible accessories or backpack.
description: A stylized child figure with short tousled hair, a short-sleeve shirt, loose pants, and sneakers, arms extended outward in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, shirt, pants, and sneakers, with arms extended and hands open.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair, and the side of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and sneakers, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hair, and the side of the shirt and pants.
attribute_hairstyle: short, tousled hair with side-swept bangs
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
